# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Files Upload
Description: Allows logged-in users to upload profile pictures and documents to a dedicated user-files directory.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class User_Files_Upload_Plugin {
    private static $instance = null;
    private $upload_subdir = 'user-files';

    public static function instance() {
        if (self::$instance === null) {
            self::$instance = new self();
        }
        return self::$instance;
    }

    private function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_post_user_files_upload', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        add_action('admin_post_nopriv_user_files_upload', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        add_shortcode('user_files_upload_form', array($this, 'render_form'));
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
    }

    public function activate() {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $target_dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . $this->upload_subdir;
        if (!file_exists($target_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($target_dir);
        }

        $index_file = trailingslashit($target_dir) . 'index.php';
        if (!file_exists($index_file)) {
            @file_put_contents($index_file, "<?php\n// Silence is golden.\n");
        }
    }

    public function render_form() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $message = '';
        if (isset($_GET['user_files_msg'])) {
            $msg = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['user_files_msg']));
            if ($msg === 'success') {
                $message = '<p class="user-files-success">File uploaded successfully.</p>';
            } elseif ($msg === 'error') {
                $message = '<p class="user-files-error">There was an error uploading your file.</p>';
            }
        }

        ob_start();
        echo $message;
        ?>
        <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" action="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin-post.php')); ?>">
            <p>
                <label for="user_file">Choose file</label><br>
                <input type="file" name="user_file" id="user_file" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.webp,.pdf,.doc,.docx,.txt,.rtf">
            </p>
            <p>
                <label for="user_file_type">File type</label><br>
                <select name="user_file_type" id="user_file_type">
                    <option value="profile_picture">Profile Picture</option>
                    <option value="document">Document</option>
                </select>
            </p>
            <?php wp_nonce_field('user_files_upload_action', 'user_files_upload_nonce'); ?>
            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="user_files_upload">
            <p><button type="submit">Upload</button></p>
        </form>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('Unauthorized', 'Unauthorized', array('response' => 401));
        }

        if (
            !isset($_POST['user_files_upload_nonce']) ||
            !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['user_files_upload_nonce'])), 'user_files_upload_action')
        ) {
            wp_die('Invalid nonce');
        }

        if (empty($_FILES['user_file']) || !isset($_FILES['user_file']['name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error');
        }

        $file = $_FILES['user_file'];

        if (!empty($file['error']) && $file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error');
        }

        $allowed_mimes = array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png'          => 'image/png',
            'gif'          => 'image/gif',
            'webp'         => 'image/webp',
            'pdf'          => 'application/pdf',
            'doc'          => 'application/msword',
            'docx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'txt'          => 'text/plain',
            'rtf'          => 'application/rtf',
        );

        $file_info = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $file['name'], $allowed_mimes);
        $ext = isset($file_info['ext']) ? $file_info['ext'] : '';
        $type = isset($file_info['type']) ? $file_info['type'] : '';

        if (!$ext || !$type) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error');
        }

        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $target_dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . $this->upload_subdir;

        if (!file_exists($target_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($target_dir);
        }

        $sanitized_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $unique_name = wp_unique_filename($target_dir, $sanitized_name);
        $destination = trailingslashit($target_dir) . $unique_name;

        $moved = @move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination);

        if (!$moved) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error');
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'user_files_uploads', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = array();
        }

        $user_files[] = array(
            'file_name' => $unique_name,
            'file_path' => $destination,
            'file_url'  => trailingslashit($upload_dir['baseurl']) . $this->upload_subdir . '/' . $unique_name,
            'file_type' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['user_file_type'] ?? 'document')),
            'uploaded'  => current_time('mysql'),
            'mime_type' => $type,
        );

        update_user_meta($user_id, 'user_files_uploads', $user_files);

        $this->redirect_with_message('success');
    }

    private function redirect_with_message($message) {
        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }
        $redirect = add_query_arg('user_files_msg', $message, $redirect);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }
}

User_Files_Upload_Plugin::instance();
